Butterflies

  1. Home
  3. Gallery
  4. Animals
  5. Insects
  6. Butterflies
  7. Butterflies

Hobomok Skipper — a compact orange-and-brown skipper resting on a broad leaf

Hobomok Skipper in Filtered Sun — warm orange wings against fresh green foliage

Hobomok Skipper at Rest — a low, alert posture typical of grass skippers


Butterflies bring color, movement, and small moments of stillness to the field: wings opening in sunlight, skippers tucked low on leaves, and brief flashes of pattern along trails, flowers, and woodland edges.

Butterfly Galleries

This section gathers butterfly encounters by species and field setting, from small skippers resting on foliage to larger, more familiar butterflies moving through meadows, gardens, and woodland openings. Each gallery focuses on posture, behavior, habitat, and the visual details that make these insects worth a closer look. 

<div class="tile" role="listitem">
  <a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/hobomok-skipper/">
    <img src="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/assets/hobomok-skipper/E22A3866.jpg" class="cover" alt="Hobomok Skipper on a sunlit green leaf">
  </a>
  <strong><a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/hobomok-skipper/">Hobomok Skipper</a></strong><br>
  <em>A small orange-and-brown skipper rests on a broad green leaf in filtered sunlight.</em><br>
  <span>Compact, fuzzy-bodied, and quick to launch, this skipper has the hooked antennae and alert posture that separate skipper butterflies from moths at a glance.</span>
</div>

<div class="tile placeholder" role="listitem">
  <a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/monarch/">
    <!-- Replace with a Monarch image when the gallery is ready. -->
    <img src="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/assets/monarch/placeholder.jpg" class="cover" alt="Monarch butterfly placeholder image">
  </a>
  <strong><a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/monarch/">Monarch</a></strong><br>
  <em>Placeholder gallery for Monarch butterfly photos.</em><br>
  <span>Use this tile for orange-and-black Monarch images, especially adults on flowers, milkweed habitat, caterpillars, or migration-season encounters.</span>
</div>

<div class="tile placeholder" role="listitem">
  <a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/pearly-eye/">
    <!-- Replace with a Pearly-eye image when the gallery is ready. -->
    <img src="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/assets/pearly-eye/placeholder.jpg" class="cover" alt="Pearly-eye butterfly placeholder image">
  </a>
  <strong><a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/pearly-eye/">Pearly-eye</a></strong><br>
  <em>Placeholder gallery for Pearly-eye butterfly photos.</em><br>
  <span>This future gallery can highlight woodland-edge butterflies with soft brown wings, eye spots, and the shaded habitats where pearly-eyes are often encountered.</span>
</div>

<div class="tile placeholder" role="listitem">
  <a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/red-spotted-admiral/">
    <!-- Replace with a Red-spotted Admiral image when the gallery is ready. -->
    <img src="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/assets/red-spotted-admiral/placeholder.jpg" class="cover" alt="Red-spotted Admiral butterfly placeholder image">
  </a>
  <strong><a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/red-spotted-admiral/">Red-spotted Admiral</a></strong><br>
  <em>Placeholder gallery for Red-spotted Admiral photos.</em><br>
  <span>Use this tile for dark-winged adults with blue iridescence, red-orange spots, and the striking pattern that makes this woodland butterfly stand out in shade and sun.</span>
</div>

<div class="tile placeholder" role="listitem">
  <a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/yellow-swallowtail/">
    <!-- Replace with a Yellow Swallowtail image when the gallery is ready. -->
    <img src="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/assets/yellow-swallowtail/placeholder.jpg" class="cover" alt="Yellow Swallowtail butterfly placeholder image">
  </a>
  <strong><a href="/gallery/animals/insects/butterflies/yellow-swallowtail/">Yellow Swallowtail</a></strong><br>
  <em>Placeholder gallery for Yellow Swallowtail photos.</em><br>
  <span>This future gallery can feature large yellow swallowtails nectaring on flowers, gliding through open habitat, or showing the tails and bold striping that make them unmistakable in the field.</span>
</div>
